name: Lee Hansel Solevilla
summary:
Senior Software Engineer with 10 years of experience building and operating production-grade full-stack systems using React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. Backend-leaning, with deep expertise across distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and cloud infrastructure (GCP/AWS), and a strong focus on scalability, reliability, and performance.
Core member of a fast-paced startup that scaled from 250k to over 1M users in a year, owning end-to-end features from technical design and data modeling through production deployment, including complex data visualization and multi-framework delivery.
Experienced mentor and technical leader, driving architectural decisions, improving developer experience, and aligning engineering execution with business outcomes.
